channel.title: オシャレなユニバーサル アプリの作り方 – その１ へのコメント
channel.description: Ext JS 関連の話題を取り上げます。

item.title: Destry より
item.dc:creator: Destry
item.description: <p>Thanks for this – great video and very well presented. I’ve been aware of the sodium / potassium balance issue for ages. I’ve used this asï»¿ an embed over at my own sikhnTea.ts again</p>
item.content:encoded: Thanks for this – great video and very well presented. I’ve been aware of the sodium / potassium balance issue for ages. I’ve used this asï»¿ an embed over at my own sikhnTea.ts again
